## The problem

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like Orbit to do.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why you rejected them.

## Additional context

Mockups, similar features in other apps, links to discussions, etc.
